isolation.note: Read-only checks on example artifacts and live CLI output

assertions.title: All JSON outputs include version field
All JSON outputs include routing_backend field

steps.observed: All 5 files have non-empty routing_backend: CpuBackend, TrigramIndex, AstBackend (x2), GpuSidecar

assertions.title: All JSON outputs include routing_reason field

steps.observed: All 5 files have non-empty routing_reason: cpu-native, index-accelerated, ast-native (x2), gpu-device-ids-explicit

assertions.title: GPU sidecar JSON includes unified envelope

steps.expected: version, routing_backend, routing_reason, sidecar_used all present
steps.observed: All four fields present: version=1, routing_backend=GpuSidecar, routing_reason=gpu-device-ids-explicit, sidecar_used=true
Exit code 1: 'CuDF and Torch GPU backends were unavailable' - expected per known issue. Artifact validates the contract.

assertions.title: Schema compatibility test exists and passes

steps.action: Run cargo test --test test_schema_compat in rust_core/
steps.observed: 1 test found (test_docs_examples_match_v1_schema), passed. Uses serde(deny_unknown_fields) for strict validation of all 5 example JSON shapes.

assertions.title: Schema compat test validates all example artifacts

steps.observed: EXPECTED_EXAMPLES constant lists all 5 files. Test asserts actual files match expected set, then validates each against typed struct with deny_unknown_fields.
1 passed, 0 failed. All 5 example artifacts validated: search.json, index_search.json, rewrite_plan.json, rewrite_apply_verify.json, gpu_sidecar_search.json

assertions.title: No concatenated JSON objects in any output

steps.expected: Single parse succeeds for each file
steps.observed: All 5 files parsed successfully as single JSON documents
Exit code 0, stdout=258 bytes, json.loads() succeeds as single parse, total_matches=1, all envelope keys present

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. All 5 example JSON artifacts (search, index_search, rewrite_plan, rewrite_apply_verify, gpu_sidecar_search) contain version (int), routing_backend (non-empty string), routing_reason (non-empty string), and sidecar_used (bool) fields. Schema compat Rust test exists and validates all artifacts with strict deny_unknown_fields deserialization. Live CLI produces single-document JSON. GPU sidecar unavailable at runtime (known issue) but artifact validates the contract.
